summary: Amazon Braket is an aggregation platform that brokers access to multiple hardware providers. Job results and device calibration are returned through the Braket task API and the Braket device API.

fixture_to_public_schema.snapshot.status: Braket task state (QueuedType/RUNNING/COMPLETED/FAILED/CANCELLED); mapped to canonical COMPLETED here.
fixture_to_public_schema.result.measurement_counts: Measurement histogram from the task result (measurementCounts).
fixture_to_public_schema.result.compiled_circuit: Compiled/native program associated with the task, passed through verbatim.
fixture_to_public_schema.device.calibration: Device calibration/properties document returned by the Braket device API.

provenance_semantics.hardware_provider: Derived from the device ARN (e.g. arn:aws:braket:::device/qpu/ionq/... -> ionq).
provenance_semantics.compiled_circuit_evidence: provider_passthrough (Braket returns the native program as-is).
provenance_semantics.results_evidence: provider_supplied measurement_counts; execution timing derived from created/ended timestamps.
